title: rorippa amphibia var. natans
intro: Rorippa amphibia var. natans is a variant of the watercress plant, which is a semi-aquatic, perennial plant native to North America. It is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rorippa amphibia var. natans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
